Name: Meadow Connection Manager
Tagline: Server-side meadow connection manager. Parses connection configurations and instantiates database providers with graceful fallbacks for missing drivers.
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-meadow-connection-manager-filled-light">
				<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 24 2
		H 72
		Q 94 2 94 24
		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z" fill="#f519ec"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-meadow-connection-manager-filled-light)"><rect x="26" y="14" width="18" height="68" rx="4" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/><rect x="52" y="14" width="18" height="68" rx="4" fill="#66c4f3"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="28" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">MCM</text>
	</svg>
